scripts.test: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test
scripts.test:chromium: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.test:mobile: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test --project=mobile-chrome
scripts.test:headed: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:login: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test tests/login.spec.ts
scripts.test:forgot: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test tests/forgot-password.spec.ts
scripts.test:dashboard: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test tests/dashboard.spec.ts
scripts.test:monitor: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test tests/monitor.spec.ts
scripts.test:workflows: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test tests/monitor-audit-workflows.spec.ts
scripts.test:calendar: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test tests/audit-calendar.spec.ts
scripts.test:quick-audit: npx rimraf playwright-report test-results && playwright test tests/quick-audit.spec.ts
